calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One, From Defendant Robert C. Martin And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Justin Thompson, Esq. 415-660-3342 Wolford Wayne for Plaintiff.
Michael Tcheng, Esq. 415-269-9015 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Thompson agrees with the court's TR; sanctions are warranted, party did not participate in a meaningful meet and confer. Mr. Tcheng contests sanctions which were granted on the motions to compel. Mr. Tcheng raise 3 issues; 3rd party unit, plaintiff's unit and meet and confer efforts. The court shares its views. Mr. Thompson echoes the court's reasoning. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - PLAINTIFF MICKAELA NORRIS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One, From Defendant Robert C. Martin And Request For Sanctions.

Mickaela Norris's Motion to Compel Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One.

Taken Under Submission.***

Two proposed orders submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order granting plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to requests for production of documents, set one, from defendant robert c. martin and request for sanctions. (see scanned order for details)***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, From Defendant Robert C. Martin And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Justin Thompson, Esq. 415-660-3342 Wolford Wayne for Plaintiff.
Michael Tcheng, Esq. 415-269-9015 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Thompson agrees with the court's TR; sanctions are warranted, party did not participate in a meaningful meet and confer. Mr. Tcheng contests sanctions which were granted on the motions to compel. Mr. Tcheng raise 3 issues; 3rd party unit, plaintiff's unit and meet and confer efforts. The court shares its views. Mr. Thompson echoes the court's reasoning. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF MICKAELA NORRIS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, From Defendant Robert C. Martin And Request For Sanctions.

Mickaela Norris Motion to Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One.

Taken Under Submission.***

Two proposed orders submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
